summary: iter257 cookie-based profile switching verified - All 10 backend tests pass. William's complaint about profile-switch reverting to admin on page reload is fixed. The new cookie-based override (echo_dev_user + echo_dev_auth) survives page reloads and is immune to PWA service-worker caching.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth.py:142-143 correctly reads echo_dev_user cookie BEFORE X-Dev-User-Id header (cookie takes precedence)
Cookie-based auth survives page reloads because cookies are sent at HTTP level, not JS fetch level
Frontend UserAvatarMenu.tsx:132-133 sets cookies with max-age=1y, path=/, SameSite=Lax
handleLogout() at line 154-155 correctly clears both cookies on logout
All regression endpoints working: employees (19), invoices (3+), vendor-skus/lookup (Plugra), profiles (14)
test_credentials: Cookie-based: echo_dev_auth=1; echo_dev_user=USER_ID. Fallback: ?devAuth=1 query param
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter257 fixed William's profile-switch bug. Key fix: switched from localStorage→header injection (which was bypassed by PWA service-worker caching) to cookie-based override (echo_dev_user + echo_dev_auth). Cookies are sent at HTTP level, immune to SW caching. Cookie takes precedence over X-Dev-User-Id header when both are present.

backend: GET /api/auth/jwt/me with cookie 'echo_dev_auth=1; echo_dev_user=director_user' → returns William Reyes, role=director
GET /api/auth/jwt/me with cookie 'echo_dev_auth=1; echo_dev_user=executive_chef_user' → returns Chef Gio, role=executive-chef
GET /api/auth/jwt/me?devAuth=1 (NO cookie) → returns admin (default fallback intact)
Cookie takes precedence over X-Dev-User-Id header when both present (director_user cookie + executive_chef_user header → returns director)
X-Dev-User-Id header still works as fallback when no cookie is set
GET /api/approvals/banner?for_user=director_user with director cookies → returns banner data scoped to director
GET /api/auth/jwt/profiles → returns 14 cleaned profiles with id, user_id, picture fields (regression pass)
